---
title: 10X Genomics
date: 2026-01-01
published-title: Created
date-modified: last-modified
title-block-banner: "#212529"
# toc: true
# toc-location: left
toc-title: "Contents"
execute:
    eval: false
format:
    html:
        code-tools:
            source: true
            toggle: true

---

## Techniques

### Chromium

![](barcoding_process_in_Universal_3_assay.png){fig-align="center" width="800"}



![](barcoding_process_in_Universal_5_assay.png){fig-align="center" width="800"}

![](barcoding_process_in_Universal_Flex_assay.png){fig-align="center" width="800"}



* Visium

* Xenium

## scATAC + Gene Expression

![10x Multiome workflow](10x-Multiome-Workflow.png){fig-align="center" width="800"}

* Unique benefits of 10x Multiome:
  * Cross-validate gene expression and chromatin accessibility data from the same cell
  * Identify activate regulatory elements and map out high resolution gene regulatory networks
